Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.subsea

Enum Class BarrierElement.ElementType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<BarrierElement.ElementType>
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.subsea.BarrierElement.ElementType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<BarrierElement.ElementType>, Constable
Enclosing class:
BarrierElement
public static enum BarrierElement.ElementType extends Enum<BarrierElement.ElementType>
Well barrier element types per NORSOK D-010 Figure 3 and Tables 20/36/37.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    ANNULUS_ACCESS_VALVE
    Annulus access valve.
    ASV
    Annular safety valve (ASV).
    CASING
    Production casing and casing cement.
    CASING_CEMENT
    Casing cement behind production casing.
    CEMENT
    Cement (primary or secondary).
    CHEMICAL_INJECTION_VALVE
    Chemical injection valve.
    DHSV
    Downhole safety valve (SSSV/SCSSV).
    FORMATION
    Formation (competent caprock).
    GAUGE
    In-well monitoring gauge.
    ISV
    Injection safety valve (ISV) required per NORSOK D-010 Table 36.
    KILL_VALVE
    Kill valve.
    PACKER
    Production packer.
    PLUG
    Mechanical plug (bridge plug or cement plug).
    SWAB_VALVE
    Swab valve.
    TUBING
    Tubing string.
    WELLHEAD
    Wellhead and tubing hanger.
    WING_VALVE
    Wing valve (WV/PWV).
    XMAS_TREE
    Christmas tree and master valve.

    • valueOf

      public static BarrierElement.ElementType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
